title: Complementary Filter for IMU Attitude Estimation
content: The complementary filter fuses high-frequency gyroscope integration with low-frequency accelerometer tilt: θ = α*(θ + ω*dt) + (1-α)*θ_acc, where α≈0.98. It exploits gyro accuracy at high frequencies and accelerometer accuracy near DC with O(1) computation per axis per sample, suitable for 1 kHz attitude loops on ARM Cortex-M MCUs without requiring matrix operations.
